DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF MAJED MASSIS' MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES SET ONE, FORM INTERROGATORIES SET ONE, INSPECTION DEMAND SET ONE, TO DEEM REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION SET ONE ADMITTED, AND MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED EXCEPT THAT REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS ARE WITHDRAWN. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,290 IS GRANTED, PAYMENT TO BE MADE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. MOVING PARTY IS REMINDED TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 3.7. WRITTEN ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: NOAH LEBOWITZ; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; NOT REPORTED.

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Attendance At Deposition And Responses To Inspection Demand Set Two And Special Interrogatories Set Two And Impose Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-08-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Johnny Knadler, Esq. 310-564-6695 for Plaintiff/Moving party MAJED MASSIS.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. Plaintiff reports matter is uncontested.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF MAJED MASSIS' Motion To Compel Attendance At Deposition And Responses To Inspection Demand Set Two And Special Interrogatories Set Two And Impose Monetary Sanctions is Granted. Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)Judge Pro Tem: Bruce Highman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/JPT/HK)

Off Calendar Feb-28-2017 Continued To Sep-11-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories Set One Form Interrogatories Set One Inspection Demand Set One To Deem Requests For Admission Set One Admitted And Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-03-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, John Knadler of the law offices of Johnny Knadler (916.948.3571) appears as counsel for the plaintiff/moving party

Attorney, Michael J. Guglielmino, Esq. (415.221.7174) appears as counsel for defendants/opposing parties

Both sides stipulate to the judge pro tem. Having conferred in the hallway, counsel for both sides report to the Court that they partially resolved the issues regarding requests for admissions. Accordingly, the moving party withdraws the motion only as to requests for admissions. Otherwise, both sides submit on the tentative ruling. The Court confirms the tentative ruling with modification.

PLAINTIFF MAJED MASSIS' Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories Set One, Form Interrogatories Set One, Inspection Demand Set One, To Deem Requests For Admission Set One Admitted, And Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED except that Requests for Admissions are withdrawn. No opposition filed. The request for sanctions in the amount of $1,290 is GRANTED, payment to be made within 60 days of notice of entry of order. Moving party is reminded to comply with Local Rule 3.7. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302/jpt)
